highlights: Built a greenfield cross-platform exhibits management platform using React Native, React Native Web, TypeScript, and MobX, delivering features across mobile and web clients.
Built a PDF generation engine for creating official government forms from dynamic templates, and contributed broadly to the React/TypeScript web portal it was part of.
Built offline-first barcode scanning realtime sync for a field auditing system, including validation, optimistic updates, and WebSocket-based synchronisation.
Contributed to backend services using Express, MSSQL, and TypeORM.
Implemented Microsoft Intune SDK integration for secure enterprise mobile app management and configuration policies.
Redesigned and rewrote the Swyftx cryptocurrency exchange web app in React and TypeScript, working closely with designers throughout development.
Specialised in building trading charts and market visualisations using d3.js and TradingView.
Built and maintained reusable UI components for the internal design system.
Reviewed code and mentored junior developers within the team.
Built frontend features and UI components for internal and client-facing applications using TypeScript, React, Material-UI, and MobX.
Designed and built a Raspberry Pi–based data display board with a drag-and-drop interface for configuring chart types, timespans, and slide order; deployed across multiple client sites.
Built a broad range of interactive charts and visualisations for energy metrics.

projects.name: Geoverse
projects.description: Built out of a personal vendetta against ad-riddled geography apps, featuring configurable flags/capitals/outline quizzes, multiple mini-games, and progression systems for iOS.

projects.name: A Timeline Project
projects.description: Infinite zoomable timeline of historical events from the Big Bang to modern civilisation.
